title: Deepgram Recognizer Options
description: Deepgram-specific STT options. Only applies when recognizer vendor is 'deepgram'.

deepgramSttUseTls.description: Whether to use TLS when connecting to the Deepgram STT endpoint.

apiKey.description: Deepgram API key. Overrides the key configured in jambonz.

customModel.description: ID of a custom-trained Deepgram model.

smartFormatting.description: Enable Deepgram smart formatting (dates, numbers, etc.).

noDelay.description: Disable Deepgram's internal buffering for lower latency.

alternatives.description: Number of alternative transcripts to return.

search.description: Terms to search for in the transcript.

replace.description: Terms to replace in the transcript.

keyterms.description: Key terms to boost recognition for.

endpointing.description: Endpointing sensitivity. Boolean to enable/disable, or number of milliseconds.

utteranceEndMs.description: Milliseconds of silence to detect end of utterance.

vadTurnoff.description: Milliseconds of silence before VAD turns off.

tag.description: Tag to associate with the request for tracking.

fillerWords.description: Include filler words (um, uh) in transcript.

mipOptOut.description: Opt out of Deepgram's model improvement program.

eagerEotThreshold.description: Eager end-of-turn threshold for faster response.
